channel.title: Stars on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Stars on Arrans github.io

item.title: loft-sh/vcluster
item.description: vCluster - Create fully functional virtual Kubernetes clusters - Each vcluster runs inside a namespace of the underlying k8s cluster. It’s cheaper than creating separate full-blown clusters and it offers better multi-tenancy and isolation than regular namespaces.

item.title: warpdotdev/Warp
item.description: Warp is a modern, Rust-based terminal with AI built in so you and your team can build great software, faster.

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: termux/termux-app
item.description: Termux - a terminal emulator application for Android OS extendible by variety of packages.

item.title: massgravel/Microsoft-Activation-Scripts
item.description: Open-source Windows and Office activator featuring HWID, Ohook, TSforge, KMS38, and Online KMS activation methods, along with advanced troubleshooting.

item.title: ahmetoner/whisper-asr-webservice
item.description: OpenAI Whisper ASR Webservice API

item.title: vlang/v
item.description: Simple, fast, safe, compiled language for developing maintainable software. Compiles itself in <1s with zero library dependencies. Supports automatic C => V translation. https://vlang.io

item.title: torvalds/linux
item.description: Linux kernel source tree

item.title: vercel/ai-chatbot
item.description: A full-featured, hackable Next.js AI chatbot built by Vercel

item.title: appwrite/appwrite
item.description: Your backend, minus the hassle.

item.title: dani-garcia/vaultwarden
item.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

item.title: exo-explore/exo
item.description: Run your own AI cluster at home with everyday devices 📱💻 🖥️⌚

item.title: Discord-Client-Encyclopedia-Management/Discord3rdparties
item.description: A non-exhaustive collection of third-party clients and mods for Discord.

item.title: open-webui/open-webui
item.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, …)

item.title: huggingface/diffusers
item.description: 🤗 Diffusers: State-of-the-art diffusion models for image, video, and audio generation in PyTorch and FLAX.

item.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
item.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: henrygd/beszel
item.description: Lightweight server monitoring hub with historical data, docker stats, and alerts.

item.title: Mintplex-Labs/anything-llm
item.description: The all-in-one Desktop & Docker AI application with built-in RAG, AI agents, and more.

item.title: sdras/awesome-actions
item.description: A curated list of awesome actions to use on GitHub

item.title: shadcn-ui/ui
item.description: A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

item.title: iptv-org/iptv
item.description: Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

item.title: Zipstack/unstract
item.description: No-code LLM Platform to launch APIs and ETL Pipelines to structure unstructured documents

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted
item.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers

item.title: ultralytics/ultralytics
item.description: Ultralytics YOLO11 🚀

item.title: lobehub/lobe-chat
item.description: 🤯 Lobe Chat - an open-source, modern-design AI chat framework. Supports Multi AI Providers( OpenAI / Claude 3 / Gemini / Ollama / Qwen / DeepSeek), Knowledge Base (file upload / knowledge management / RAG ), Multi-Modals (Vision/TTS/Plugins/Artifacts). One-click FREE deployment of your private ChatGPT/ Claude application.

item.title: linkwarden/linkwarden
item.description: ⚡️⚡️⚡️Self-hosted collaborative bookmark manager to collect, organize, and preserve webpages, articles, and documents.

item.title: vllm-project/vllm
item.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

item.title: SWE-agent/SWE-agent
item.description: SWE-agent takes a GitHub issue and tries to automatically fix it, using GPT-4, or your LM of choice. It can also be employed for offensive cybersecurity or competitive coding challenges. [NeurIPS 2024]

item.title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
item.description: Collection of awesome LLM apps with AI Agents and RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.

item.title: infiniflow/ragflow
item.description: RAGFlow is an open-source RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) engine based on deep document understanding.

item.title: poteto/hiring-without-whiteboards
item.description: ⭐️ Companies that don’t have a broken hiring process

item.title: outline/outline
item.description: The fastest knowledge base for growing teams. Beautiful, realtime collaborative, feature packed, and markdown compatible.

item.title: ollama/ollama
item.description: Get up and running with Llama 3.3, DeepSeek-R1, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models.

item.title: rockerBOO/awesome-neovim
item.description: Collections of awesome neovim plugins.

item.title: mlc-ai/web-llm
item.description: High-performance In-browser LLM Inference Engine

item.title: run-llama/llama_index
item.description: LlamaIndex is the leading framework for building LLM-powered agents over your data.

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: The open source Firebase alternative. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: go-delve/delve
item.description: Delve is a debugger for the Go programming language.

item.title: bigcode-project/starcoder
item.description: Home of StarCoder: fine-tuning & inference!

item.title: Hannibal046/Awesome-LLM
item.description: Awesome-LLM: a curated list of Large Language Model

item.title: solidtime-io/solidtime
item.description: Modern open-source time-tracking app

item.title: Mobile-Artificial-Intelligence/maid
item.description: Maid is a cross-platform Flutter app for interfacing with GGUF / llama.cpp models locally, and with Ollama and OpenAI models remotely.

item.title: rfjakob/gocryptfs
item.description: Encrypted overlay filesystem written in Go

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Self-hostable. Get answers from the web or your docs. Build custom agents, schedule automations, do deep research. Turn any online or local LLM into your personal, autonomous AI (gpt, claude, gemini, llama, qwen, mistral). Get started - free.

item.title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
item.description: An incremental parsing system for programming tools

item.title: anuraghazra/github-readme-stats
item.description: ⚡ Dynamically generated stats for your github readmes

item.title: fathyb/carbonyl
item.description: Chromium running inside your terminal

item.title: microsoft/PowerToys
item.description: Windows system utilities to maximize productivity

item.title: nextcloud/server
item.description: ☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

item.title: f/awesome-chatgpt-prompts
item.description: This repo includes ChatGPT prompt curation to use ChatGPT and other LLM tools better.

item.title: hpcaitech/Open-Sora
item.description: Open-Sora: Democratizing Efficient Video Production for All

item.title: godotengine/godot
item.description: Godot Engine – Multi-platform 2D and 3D game engine

item.title: aristocratos/btop
item.description: A monitor of resources

item.title: nektos/act
item.description: Run your GitHub Actions locally 🚀

item.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases
item.description: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

item.title: logseq/logseq
item.description: A privacy-first, open-source platform for knowledge management and collaboration. Download link: http://github.com/logseq/logseq/releases. roadmap: http://trello.com/b/8txSM12G/roadmap

item.description: AI chat for any model.

item.description: A generative speech model for daily dialogue.

item.description: A feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader

item.title: BurntSushi/ripgrep
item.description: ripgrep recursively searches directories for a regex pattern while respecting your gitignore

item.title: automatisch/automatisch
item.description: The open source Zapier alternative. Build workflow automation without spending time and money.

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: Fully Open Source, End-to-End Encrypted Cloud

item.title: beemdevelopment/Aegis
item.description: A free, secure and open source app for Android to manage your 2-step verification tokens.

item.title: caddyserver/caddy
item.description: Fast and extensible multi-platform HTTP/1-2-3 web server with automatic HTTPS

item.title: kubernetes-sigs/metrics-server
item.description: Scalable and efficient source of container resource metrics for Kubernetes built-in autoscaling pipelines.

item.title: docmost/docmost
item.description: Docmost is an open-source collaborative wiki and documentation software. It is an open-source alternative to Confluence and Notion.

item.title: comfyanonymous/ComfyUI
item.description: The most powerful and modular diffusion model GUI, api and backend with a graph/nodes interface.

item.title: sqlc-dev/sqlc
item.description: Generate type-safe code from SQL

item.title: seanmorley15/AdventureLog
item.description: Self-hostable travel tracker and trip planner.

item.title: donnemartin/system-design-primer
item.description: Learn how to design large-scale systems. Prep for the system design interview. Includes Anki flashcards.

item.title: syncthing/syncthing
item.description: Open Source Continuous File Synchronization

item.title: n8n-io/n8n
item.description: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.

item.title: dockur/macos
item.description: OSX (macOS) inside a Docker container.

item.title: carbon-language/carbon-lang
item.description: Carbon Language’s main repository: documents, design, implementation, and related tools. (NOTE: Carbon Language is experimental; see README)

item.title: ggml-org/llama.cpp
item.description: LLM inference in C/C++

item.title: makeplane/plane
item.description: 🔥 🔥 🔥 Open Source JIRA, Linear, Monday, and Asana Alternative. Plane helps you track your issues, epics, and cycles the easiest way on the planet.

item.title: posquit0/Awesome-CV
item.description: 📄 Awesome CV is LaTeX template for your outstanding job application

item.title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
item.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

item.title: cline/cline
item.description: Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.

item.title: processone/ejabberd
item.description: Robust, Ubiquitous and Massively Scalable Messaging Platform (XMPP, MQTT, SIP Server)

item.title: Kwai-Kolors/Kolors
item.description: Kolors Team

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speaker diarization, and VAD using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, C/C++, Python, Kotlin, C#, Go, NodeJS, Java, Swift, Dart, JavaScript, Flutter, Object Pascal, Lazarus, Rust

item.title: gorgonia/gorgonia
item.description: Gorgonia is a library that helps facilitate machine learning in Go.

item.title: ziglang/zig
item.description: General-purpose programming language and toolchain for maintaining robust, optimal, and reusable software.

item.title: mendableai/firecrawl
item.description: 🔥 Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data. Scrape, crawl and extract with a single API.

item.title: gentoo/gentoo
item.description: [MIRROR] Official Gentoo ebuild repository

item.title: AlexxIT/go2rtc
item.description: Ultimate camera streaming application with support RTSP, RTMP, HTTP-FLV, WebRTC, MSE, HLS, MP4, MJPEG, HomeKit, FFmpeg, etc.

item.title: vercel-labs/slacker
item.description: A bot that notifies you on Slack whenever your company/product is mentioned on Hacker News. Powered by Vercel Functions & Upstash.

item.title: omnivore-app/omnivore
item.description: Omnivore is a complete, open source read-it-later solution for people who like reading.

item.title: jmigpin/editor
item.description: Source code editor in pure Go.

item.description: A general purpose syntax highlighter in pure Go

item.title: LadybirdBrowser/ladybird
item.description: Truly independent web browser

item.description: Command-line program to download videos from YouTube.com and other video sites

item.title: unclecode/crawl4ai
item.description: 🚀🤖 Crawl4AI: Open-source LLM Friendly Web Crawler & Scraper

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: elixir-nx/bumblebee
item.description: Pre-trained Neural Network models in Axon (+ 🤗 Models integration)

item.description: TTS with kokoro and onnx runtime
